rules.name: categories
rules.selector: div.meta-below-content a[rel='category tag'], div.blog__entry__content__categories a, div.blog__entry a, div.categories a, a[rel='category tag']

rules.name: tags
rules.selector: ul.blog__entry__content__tags li a, div.blog__entry ul li a, .tags a, .tag a

rules.name: featured_image
rules.selector: div.blog__entry__image img, .featured-image img, .post-thumbnail img, article img:first-of-type, [itemprop='image']

rules.name: content_html
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text, div.blog__entry__content > div, div.blog__entry__content, div.editor, div.entry-content.text-content-container, div.entry, article .entry-content, [itemprop='articleBody']

rules.name: content_text
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text, div.blog__entry__content > div, div.blog__entry__content, div.editor, div.entry-content.text-content-container, div.entry, article .entry-content, [itemprop='articleBody']

rules.name: content_images
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text img, div.blog__entry__content img, div.editor img, div.entry img, .entry-content img

rules.name: content_image_alts
rules.selector: div.blog__article__content__text img, div.blog__entry__content img, div.editor img, div.entry img, .entry-content img
